semantic_text:
Fix TypeScript build errors - add missing types

- Add TaskWithPriority interface to frontend types
- Add archive/delete fields to Task interface
- Fix import errors in tasks.ts

🚀 Smart Task Interaction & Context-Aware Actions

Revolutionary UI Enhancements:
- Added child task display with direct edit functionality
- Implemented smart click interactions (children vs main task)
- Created context-aware action buttons based on task type and timing
- Added secondary actions dropdown with intelligent suggestions

Child Task Features:
- Beautiful visual display of sub-tasks in main task card
- Click child tasks to edit them directly
- Shows up to 3 children with '+ X more' indicator
- Icons, descriptions, and duration for each child
- Hover effects and accessibility support

Smart Context Actions:
- MEETINGS: 'Mark Attended' vs 'Reschedule' based on date/time
- ROUTINES: 'Mark Cycle Complete' for recurring tasks
- PROJECTS: 'Update Progress' with milestone options
- Smart meeting logic: upcoming vs past meetings get different actions

Secondary Actions Menu:
- Dropdown with contextual options (Edit Details, Reschedule, etc.)
- Meeting-specific: Add Notes, Was Cancelled, Reschedule
- Project-specific: Add Milestone, Mark Complete
- Routine-specific: Skip Cycle, Change Frequency

Enhanced UX:
- Click children to edit directly
- Click main card area to edit main task
- Prevents accidental triggers with smart click detection
- Beautiful styling with gradients and hover effects
- Fully accessible with keyboard navigation

This creates an intuitive 'inch forward' workflow where users can quickly access exactly the action they need based on the task context and timing.

🧹 Clean up debug console logging after confirming system works correctly

- Removed parent relationship debug logging from App.tsx task loading
- Removed verbose save validation debug logging from TaskModal.tsx
- Kept autocomplete="off" fixes for browser interference prevention
- Debug confirmed parent-child relationships are working as intended

Task wr_205 showing parent relationship with routine wr_0201 is correct behavior
- indicates wr_205 is a child task belonging to routine wr_0201.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Fix duplicate 'modified' column assignment error in PUT endpoint
Fix TypeScript compilation errors - ensure managerId is always defined

✨ Major UI/UX improvements for task management

- Fix subtask creation: Generate unique IDs and auto-description "Task X of [Parent]"
- Improve parent indicator: Plain English "IS A TASK OF [NAME] [TYPE]" with full click area
- Remove redundant Add Task button from main view (now only in SubTasksPanel)
- Transform edit modal sections into inline panels with show/hide controls
- Add Edit/View mode toggle for inline editing
- Create modular panel system: Details, Planning, Notes panels
- Add panel visibility controls in TaskModal
- Save panel preferences to localStorage
- Fix task navigation: Clicking tasks in lists loads them as current view

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix database migration conflicts and constraints

- Fix migration 003 trigger creation to avoid duplicate trigger errors
- Fix migration 004 to use IF NOT EXISTS for column and index creation
- Fix migration 008 theme constraint violation by using 'light' instead of 'system'

All migrations now complete successfully and Scott admin user login works.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

🎯 Simplify subtask display to show only in dedicated panel

- Remove TaskCardRelationships component from current task view
- Remove SubTaskManager from task edit modal
- Keep subtasks only in the dedicated SubTasksPanel on home screen
- Remove unused props and imports related to subtask editing
- Improve UI clarity by consolidating subtask management to one location

This change reduces UI clutter and makes it clearer where subtasks are managed,
following the principle of having a single, dedicated location for each feature.

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix edit modal field persistence - deliverables, milestones, project_deadline

- Add missing database columns for deliverables, milestones, project_deadline
- Update TaskModel.createTask() and updateTask() to handle new fields
- Update TaskController.createTask() to include new fields in cleaned data
- Migration 011 adds columns with proper indexes and documentation
- Verified: Fields now save and persist correctly in database

Edit modal persistence issue for URLs, deliverables, milestones, project_deadline is now resolved.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

🔧 Fix task creation error - proper trigger field references

- Fixed 'record new has no field id' error on task creation
- Created separate trigger functions for each table (tasks, task_assignments, task_tags)
- Properly reference task_id field instead of id in assignment/tag tables
- Added migration script to package.json for easier future migrations
Add simple user setup migration

🔄 Replace auto-categorize with re-prioritize functionality

- Remove auto-categorize button and API endpoints
- Add Re-Prioritize button that only recalculates task priorities
- Maintain current filter and load highest priority task
- Prevent unwanted task type changes from categorization

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix loadAllItems using wrong API endpoint

- Change from /api/items to /api/memories
- Add proper Authorization header with Bearer token
- Fix 'Unexpected token <' error from 404 HTML response

Fix: Activate Scott and James user accounts

- Add migration to set is_active=true for both users
- Includes verification to ensure activation succeeded

🐛 Fix all debugInfo references

- Comment out debugInfo render block in TaskRelationshipManager
- Update deployment trigger
- Frontend build now succeeds locally

All TypeScript errors resolved

CRITICAL FIX: Disable conflicting migration 007 to allow proper Scott admin setup

- Migration 007 was trying to reference metadata column before it exists
- Migration 008 properly creates users table with metadata column AND Scott user
- This allows migration 008 to run and grant Scott proper admin permissions
- Scott should now have super_admin and admin roles after this deployment

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

🔧 Complete admin functionality and add meeting frequency field

1. Meeting Enhancements:
   - Added frequency dropdown to meetings (One-time, Daily, Weekly, Bi-weekly, Monthly)
   - Added Last Meeting Held field for recurring meetings
   - Meeting frequency connects to database frequency field properly
   - Enhanced recurring meeting support with proper date calculations

2. Admin Panel Fixes:
   - Implemented missing getStats controller method in adminController.ts
   - Fixed admin dashboard statistics endpoint
   - Consolidated stats route to use proper controller method
   - Admin dashboard now loads properly with system statistics

3. Cancel Meeting Action:
   - Identified that "Cancel Meeting" currently just opens edit modal
   - All secondary smart actions (Reschedule, Cancel Meeting, etc.) need dedicated handlers
   - This can be enhanced in future iterations with specific action implementations

Admin panel is now fully functional with dashboard stats, user management, role management, team management, and audit logs.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Rebrand from MindOS to Full Brain across entire application

- Update all references from MindOS to Full Brain
- Change localStorage keys from mindos_* to fullbrain_*
- Update CSS classes from .mindos- to .fullbrain-
- Update package name to fullbrain-cloud
- Update all URLs to reference fullbrain.cloud
- Update deployment configurations and documentation
- Maintain all functionality while updating branding

Fix card reordering functionality

- Fixed appendFeedCards to use correct indices
- Properly rebuild feed with updated indices after reordering
- Clear and rebuild feed when applying custom order
- Added console logging for debugging
- Ensure buttons are properly enabled/disabled based on position

🚨 HOTFIX: Task modal save - bypass URL trigger issue

- Added error handling around URL updates to prevent task save failures
- Task updates will complete even if URL processing has trigger issues
- Logs URL errors but continues with main task update operation
- Critical fix for Railway deployment issue
